overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 exploring a neon-lit cyberpunk adult club interior. The player moves from a dim lounge through pink-lit corridors with explicit signage, enters a red-walled bathroom with a checkered floor, then returns to the corridor passing storefronts with blue neon accents.

segments.scene_description: The clip begins in a dimly lit lounge with a round table and pink glowing windows. The player moves through a doorway into a brightly lit neon corridor, transitioning from the intimate lounge space to the industrial hallway.

segments.scene_description: Walking through the narrow neon corridor, the player passes a prominent explicit neon sign and digital advertisement screens. The walls are industrial corrugated metal with graffiti. Two characters are encountered—one standing in neon green attire and another walking away.

segments.scene_description: The player explores the bathroom interior, examining the urinal, exposed plumbing pipes, and a trash can with a magazine. The space features red walls and a window showing neon lights outside. The player then exits back into the corridor.

segments.scene_description: Back in the neon corridor, the player walks past a storefront labeled CRYSTAL with distinctive blue neon lighting. The corridor features digital display windows with posters and another character leaning against the wall.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a dim, intimate lounge through a series of vibrant, neon-lit industrial corridors and a starkly colored restroom. It begins in a dimly lit lounge with pink glowing windows before moving through a doorway into a brightly lit hallway characterized by corrugated metal walls, graffiti, and explicit neon signage. As the camera progresses past digital advertisements and figures in neon attire, the scene shifts into a small bathroom where the lighting turns a dim red against a checkered floor and exposed plumbing. After exploring the interior of the restroom, the camera exits back into the main corridor, where the color palette transitions from red to a cool blue as it passes a storefront labeled CRYSTAL. The movement finally concludes by gliding past digital display windows and another leaning figure under the glow of the corridor's neon accents.
